'''Bakur Mining Corporation''' was a [[Hemei IV]]-based company that founded a [[Human/Legends|Human]] settlement on [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] approximately a century before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. Initially, the company controlled the government of Bakura, and even by the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Invasion of Bakura]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] the titular head-of-government of Bakura was still a descendant of [[Deredith Arden]], the Bakur Mining [[Colony ship/Legends|colony ship's]] captain.

After Arden's [[Death/Legends|death]], the Corporation faced a minor crisis due to the fact that the population was growing and corporate revenue was going down. The Corporation split into factions: one which wanted to diversify and bring in more settlers, one which wanted to turn the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] into a resort, and one which wanted to prospect new [[Mining/Legends|mining]] sites. The latter, which was led by the father of [[Yeorg Captison|Yeorg]] and [[Dol Captison]], was victorious.

The Bakur Corporation established a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that lead toward Bakura.<ref name="G9:28">{{GamerCite|9|Endor and the Moddell Sector}}</ref> The company's headquarters on Bakura was in the [[Bakur Memorial Building]] in [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]]. The company had apparently folded, or at least released control of the government, by the time Yeorg Captison was elected to the [[Bakuran Senate]] c. [[26 BBY/Legends|26 BBY]].
